title: The Counter
tagline: He built the answer before they asked the question.
hook_line: Xerxes doesn't react. He prepares. The difference is everything.

scenes.title: He Prepares
scenes.narration: Xerxes doesn't react. He prepares the answer before you know you've asked the question. That is why he has never lost.
scenes.visual_prompt: Imposing wide shot of Xerxes as an overwhelming presence, vast Persian command presence, amber and gold, commanding from elevated position, calm and absolutely certain, 2.5 million soldiers visible behind him in perfect formation, dark cinematic oil painting style, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: The Resonance Wave
scenes.narration: NOVA was rebuilding her array. Nine panels active. Then the resonance wave hit — across every frequency at once.
scenes.visual_prompt: NOVA cold cyan mech with nine holographic panels partially rebuilt, then a devastating electromagnetic resonance wave sweeping through, panels exploding into static and dark, cyan light shattering outward, shockwave visible in the air, cinematic impact, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: All Dark
scenes.narration: Every panel. Dark. All nine. Simultaneously. Not jammed. Destroyed. She was completely blind and completely exposed.
scenes.visual_prompt: NOVA close-up, all holographic panels extinguished simultaneously, total darkness around her panel array points, visor showing static and alarm indicators, vulnerable posture, no data, no map, isolated, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: He Planned This
scenes.narration: ELDER-7: 'He planned this from the first contact. He watched your panels form. He built the counter. He was waiting for you to rebuild.'
scenes.visual_prompt: ELDER-7 ancient bronze 40-meter sentinel at his characteristic angle — never fully facing forward — data pad showing tactical annotation from first contact, the specific panel formation NOVA used marked and annotated, amber glow, dark background, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: STORM Moves
scenes.narration: STORM was already moving. She hadn't waited for orders either. Silent. Invisible. Through the army like smoke through a keyhole.
scenes.visual_prompt: Electric purple mech STORM 12 meters in motion, stealth coating active making her nearly invisible, motion blur between enemy formations, ghost-like presence weaving through Persian warrior units without contact, electromagnetic arcs at joints visible as the only sign of her passage, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: 34 Seconds
scenes.narration: She reached NOVA. Extracted her. Thirty-four seconds. Zero contact with any enemy unit. She was through before they knew she'd moved.
scenes.visual_prompt: STORM reaching NOVA, electric purple arm around cold cyan blue shoulder, extraction sequence in motion, NOVA's dark panel arrays trailing behind them as they move, speed and precision, Persian formation visible around them completely unaware, 34 seconds on a ghost readout, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: He Let Her
scenes.narration: Xerxes watched. He didn't pursue. He didn't close the gap. He had the angle. He chose to observe instead.
scenes.visual_prompt: Distant wide shot from Xerxes's perspective, STORM barely visible as a purple ghost trace extracting NOVA, Persian formations parting slightly and closing again, Xerxes's commanding presence in foreground watching with absolute stillness and certainty, the geometry of the extraction route visible, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: The Second Notation
scenes.narration: He made a notation. Not about NOVA this time. About STORM. Her route. Her speed. Her pattern. He was studying her.
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up cinematic on Xerxes making a marking — ancient notation tablet or scroll — STORM's extraction route diagrammed in angular precise marks, the tactical geometry of her movement preserved, deliberate and methodical, amber candlelight on the notation, dark background, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: He Wanted to See
scenes.narration: STORM to the team: 'He let me reach her. He had the angle to close. He didn't take it.' A long pause. 'He wanted to see how I move.'
scenes.visual_prompt: STORM close-up, electric purple mech, stealth coating partially deactivated now they are safe, her visor showing the replay of her own extraction route mapped as enemy data, the realization visible in her posture, NOVA beside her, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

scenes.title: 2,800 Years of Practice
scenes.narration: ELDER-7: 'Every individual function he observes, he can counter. He has had 2,800 years to study what individual mechs do. He has never seen what six do together.'
scenes.visual_prompt: ELDER-7 from below looking up, ancient bronze and deep red, asymmetric left-heavier design, 40 meters of accumulated knowledge and war, data pad closed at his side, the team visible in background as small silhouettes, vast night sky above with the distant glow of Xerxes's camp, cinematic, 1080x1920 vertical

viral_hook: He let STORM extract NOVA. He had the angle to stop her. He chose to study how she moves instead.
highlight_note: The moment Xerxes lets them escape — not because he can't stop them, but because he's learning — lands with devastating implications.
rewatch_bait: ELDER-7's final line plants the seed: 'He has never seen what six do together.' This is the setup for EP010 payoff. Rewatch EP002 — the notation Xerxes made is now explicit.
youtube_title: He Could Have Stopped Her — He Chose to Study Her Instead | Mech Legends S1 EP005
lesson: An enemy who learns from you is more dangerous than one who simply fights you.
arc_notes: EP005 completes the individual-testing arc opening. NOVA is countered. STORM's function is now being studied. ELDER-7's final line is the first time the counter-insight is named, though obliquely. Sets up EP010 payoff.
